creator: aakuusta@gmail.com
text:
I think there is no guarantee EXTRACT_DEPENDS won't be cleaned before
install[1]. And bringing back desktopfileutils is bad idea[2], it
should remain optional.

[1] http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?86wrg1zjt2.fsf
[2] http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?20110924231702.GG79140
